name: gemini-job-search-os
description: Gemini/Codex-ready career launchpad that turns a CV and public job posts into ranked matches, proof-gap audits, portfolio moves, outreach drafts, and interview prep.

scripts.launch: npm run init && npm run import-cv && node src/cli.js launch --profile profile/candidate.md --job samples/job-posting.md
scripts.scrape: node src/cli.js scrape --profile profile/candidate.md --sources jobs/sources.txt --target-currency IDR
scripts.scrape:show: node src/cli.js scrape --profile profile/candidate.md --sources jobs/sources.txt --target-currency IDR --show
scripts.scrape:demo: node src/cli.js scrape --profile profile/candidate.md --source samples/job-posting.md --target-currency IDR
scripts.scrape:demo:show: node src/cli.js scrape --profile profile/candidate.md --source samples/job-posting.md --target-currency IDR --show
scripts.prompt: node src/cli.js prompt --workflow full --profile profile/candidate.md --job samples/job-posting.md
